heroHeadline: Trump Declares 'Era of Amnesty Is Over' as Asylum Grants Fall to 7%; DHS Funnels $170M to Local Police for Enforcement
heroSubtitle: White House claims 3 million voluntary departures and 7% asylum grant rate (down from 50%+ under Biden); Marshall Project reveals DHS paid $170 million to local law enforcement as enforcement 'incentives'; Judge blocks Abrego Garcia deportation to Liberia; AG Blanche's comments threaten criminal case against wrongly deported man; DACA detentions accelerating with 21 federal court challenges in 15 months
footerNote: Data sourced from DHS, ICE official records, ACLU, HRW, DHS OIG, TRAC Reports, Detention Watch Network, court records, and Congressional records
